title: Shizuka AI
desc: An AI-powered conversational security assistant providing real-time threat intelligence, CTF guidance, and automated OSINT lookups. Built with Python and LLM APIs, Shizuka bridges the gap between raw data and actionable security insights.

title: Zero Trust Security Framework
desc: A modular implementation of Zero Trust Architecture principles for SMB environments. Features identity verification layers, micro-segmentation policies, and a continuous monitoring dashboard.

title: NmapEasy CLI
desc: A menu-driven Nmap wrapper with 14 professionally-curated scan profiles, ANSI color output, timing selection, authorization confirmation, and result export. Designed for security researchers and CTF participants.

title: IP Geolocation Intel Tool
desc: A rich-styled terminal IP intelligence tool leveraging ip-api.com and ipwho.is for multi-source geolocation lookups. Features error resilience, a safe_get() helper, and beautifully formatted Rich output panels.

title: Digital Forensics Toolkit
desc: A personal forensics toolkit for evidence collection, artifact analysis, and incident response automation. Built to assist in post-breach analysis and timeline reconstruction from system logs.
